persona: Kay – trains in low connectivity gym
stepsSummary: Switch browser context offline, log workout, then return online.
expectedSummary: Workout logging remains functional offline and data persists after reconnect.
summary: BUG: UAT-013 Offline workout logging and resumption - Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
reproSteps: Verify workout record still exists in recent list.
expected: Workout logging remains functional offline and data persists after reconnect.
recommendation: Fix the failing Offline flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-013 completes without blocking errors.
